prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-KIDSGOLFCADDYSET-RED Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Kids Sports 9pc Toy Golf Clubs with Golf Balls Putter Iron Wedge, Red, Unisex, Ages 3+ Description: Introduce toddlers and young kids to golf with this fun 9-piece golf club playset from Kidplokio. The toy set includes x3 lightweight plastic golf clubs, including iron, wedge and putter, three golf balls and two golf holes, making it a great toy that little ones can play solo or with siblings and friends.

The gold clubs measure 18 inches in length, and have been specifically designed with little hands in mind. The smaller scale and lightweight design makes them easy for toddlers or young kids to hold, swing and putt when playing. In addition, the kids toy golf clubs set comes with a plastic golf bag or golf caddy that conveniently fits all the playset component, keeping all the golf accessories organized and together.

An awesome way to get toddlers and kids moving, exercising and learning a new sport, golf is a fantastic sport for kids eye hand coordination; And not only is golf great for exercise, it also teaches patience, concentration, finesse and skill that kids can apply to other sports and activities as they grow and develop.

The Kidplokio Kids Sports 9pc Toy Golf Clubs with golf accessories makes a great addition to any sports and outdoor play toys collection or kids exercise equipment. It's is easy to pack and travel with, and most importantly, keeps little ones busy, active and making friends.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Colors Available: Blue or Red Search Terms: sports toys holiday toy list 2021 toys for boys pretend play outdoor play indoor play golfing golf accessories christmas gifts hanukkah gifts learning and educational toys golf balls hand eye coordination training Features: - KIDS TOY GOLF CLUBS: Introduce toddlers and young kids to golf with the 9pc golf club playset from Kidplokio! The toy set includes x3 lightweight plastic golf clubs (iron, wedge and putter), three golf balls and two golf holes making it a great toy that little ones can play solo or with siblings and friends! - TOY GOLF CLUBS DESIGNED FOR KIDS: The gold clubs measure 18 inches in length, and have been specifically designed with smaller hands in mind! The smaller scale and lightweight design makes them easy for toddlers or young kids to hold, swing and putt when playing - PLASTIC GOLF CLUBS STORAGE BAG INCLUDED: The kids toy golf clubs set comes with a plastic golf bag or golf caddy that conveniently fits all the playset components inside; this way all of the golf accessories stay conveniently organized, together and make travel and storage a breeze! - SPORTS AND OUTDOOR PLAY TOYS: An awesome way to get toddlers and kids moving, exercising and learning a new sport; fantastic for kids' eye hand coordination, it's not only great exercise but teaches patience, concentration, finesse and skill that they can apply to other sports and activities! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 20 x 5 x 5 inches; Weight: 0.8lbs; Available Colors: Blue or Red; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 9pc Kids Golf Clubs Set with Caddy, Red

tokens.name: Kids Golf Clubs Set with Caddy

openai.item_name: Kidplokio 9-Pc 18 In Red Kids Toy Golf Club Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 9 Pieces, Includes 3 Clubs, 3 Golf Balls, 2 Holes, Golf Bag, Ages 3 Plus, Hand Eye Coordination

openai.title_differentiation: Lightweight Plastic Clubs - 3 Clubs 3 Balls 2 Holes - Carry Bag Included - Ages 3 Plus - Indoor Outdoor Play
